strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (18+ years) with deep expertise in the primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, perfectly matching the AI agent requirement.
Exceptional background in software testing, TDD, and CI/CD, including creating test runners and teaching testing courses.
concerns: Missing explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest/Jest/Playwright, though strong general testing and Node.js skills mitigate this.
Lacks explicit mention of Kotlin or Python, which are listed as secondary/required languages.
Notable discrepancy between the applicant name (Aisha Okonkwo) and the contact details/portfolio links (Bogdan Szabo).
response.justification: The candidate possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience, significantly exceeding the 6-year requirement. Their recent roles perfectly align with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and specifically highlight highly relevant AI-agent infrastructure development. Furthermore, their extensive background in TDD, cloud deployments, and system architecture makes them an exceptionally strong fit for a Senior Fullstack Developer role, easily overcoming the lack of specific framework keywords like Nest.js.
